item.title: 人工智能计算差距：企业购买基础设施的速度快于他们能够衡量其成本的速度
item.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics. Most organizations run their AI on a familiar base of hyperscalers and model-provider APIs, yet the next dollar is aimed at specialized compute almost none of them use today; a majority intend to
